pricing: yoETH ERC-4626 vault convertToAssets(1 share) returns WETH value, scaled by 1e18 to Morpho's 1e36 format. No Chainlink feeds involved.
notes: MorphoChainlinkOracleV2 (immutable, no proxy) using only the yoETH vault's on-chain exchange rate. All four Chainlink feed slots are zero-address, and the QUOTE_VAULT is zero — making this a pure vault-rate oracle. The oracle contract is well-audited and battle-tested. However, the underlying yoETH vault is an upgradeable proxy (10+ upgrades) that can be paused and relies on multi-strategy yield accounting. SCALE_FACTOR is 1e18. Market LLTV is 91.5%.
